# v18.0 Battle BAG menu

- Renamed battle command MOVE to BAG.
- Added BAG screen with Sports Drink, Athletic Tape, Recruit Flyer, and Film Study entries.
- Sports Drink restores EP and Athletic Tape restores HP in battle.
- Preserved Phaser, title, movement, save/load, scouting, battle command flow, asset-path repair, and deployed dist structure.
